title: Sapporo Heavy Rain
lead: Sapporo is experiencing a critical heavy rain event with a Z-Score of -3.40. The city's weather is severely impacted with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Sapporo are characterized by heavy rain, with an Umidita of 90% and Vento of 8.1 km/h.
 The HDD is 12.9 GG, indicating a significant impact on heating demands. The CDD is 0.0 GG, showing no impact on cooling demands.
 The critical level of this event requires immediate attention, with potential disruptions to daily life and operations.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heavy rain in Sapporo.
